name: Asparagus & Sesame Chicken Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation: Rinse the chicken and remove any excess fat. Pat it dry and chop into bite-sized pieces. Do not use just breast meat without bones; bones add to the body and flavor of the soup.
2. Peel and slice the ginger root. Wash and cut the asparagus into 2-inch sections.
3. Braising: Heat a wok to medium hot. Add sesame oil. Start braising the chicken in batches when the oil begins to smell. Sesame oil will burn at a lower temperature than other cooking oils, so be careful not to overheat the wok.
4. After the chicken is lightly browned, return the pieces to the wok. Add the ginger slices, sherry, and salt. When the sherry comes to a boil, add the warm water and sugar.
5. Turn up the heat to bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to simmer. Cover and let it simmer for 30 minutes.
6. Add the mushrooms and asparagus, and continue simmering for another 15 minutes.
7. Transfer the soup to a covered soup tureen or place a plate on top of a soup bowl and steam until ready to serve. Alternatively, you can make this soup in a large saucepan if a wok is not available.
